description: A horizontal memorial graphic. Large white serif text on the left reads Wall of Honor beside a blue ribbon with an ICE badge logo, with smaller text reading Criminal Investigator Charles J. Bokinskie, End of Watch, Wednesday, April 24, 1974. The center shows a close-up of a gold law-enforcement badge inscribed U.S. Customs, The Department of the Treasury, and Special Agent. The right side shows red roses in front of a U.S. flag.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Criminal Investigator Charles J. Bokinskie; End of Watch; Wednesday, April 24, 1974; U.S. CUSTOMS; THE DEPARTMENT OF THE TREASURY; SPECIAL AGENT
